title: The Roepolak
story: The history of Lolland-Falster is linked to the 'roepolaks'—thousands of Polish seasonal workers who migrated to Denmark for the sugar beet fields. Among them was my great-grandmother from Podkarpackie. Her journey is a testament to the quiet tenacity of the migrant worker, representing a 25% pulse of Eastern European resilience.
impact: A historical reminder that our foundation is built on both Jutlandic soil and the courage of those who traveled to reach it.
